title: High School Girl Fights the Enemy!
overview: Wannabe pop star and swimsuit idol Momoko is given a powersuit by a mysterious alien figure.

title: The True Enemy By My Side?
overview: Natsuhiko attempts to cheer Momoko up in the aftermath of her encounter with Akiho.

title: My Rival, My Enemy
overview: Wonder Momo and Amazona team up to battle deadly Acroballs in Odaiba.

title: Shibuya Under Attack!
overview: Team Momo is pushed to the limit as aliens expand their invasion to Kyoto.
